mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.title, s.cover, s.price, s.t_price AS tPrice, s.buy_count AS buyCount, s.view_count AS viewCount, s.video_count AS videoCount, s.rating_score AS ratingScore, s.service_content AS serviceContent, s.resource_type AS resourceType, s.hot_score AS hotScore FROM ( SELECT c.id, c.title, c.cover, c.price, c.t_price, c.buy_count, c.view_count, c.video_count, c.rating_score, c.service_content, c.resource_type, c.create_time, ROUND( (0.70 * IFNULL(LN(1 + GREATEST(IFNULL(c.sales_count,0), IFNULL(c.buy_count,0))) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + GREATEST(IFNULL(x.sales_count,0), IFNULL(x.buy_count,0)))) FROM osh_course x WHERE x.status=4 AND x.delete_flag=0), 0), 0) + 0.20 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(c.view_count,0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.view_count,0))) FROM osh_course x WHERE x.status=4 AND x.delete_flag=0), 0), 0) + 0.10 * ( 0.50 * LEAST(IFNULL(c.rating_score,0), 5) / 5 + 0.20 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(c.comment_count,0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.comment_count,0))) FROM osh_course x WHERE x.status=4 AND x.delete_flag=0), 0), 0) + 0.20 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(c.collection_count,0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.collection_count,0))) FROM osh_course x WHERE x.status=4 AND x.delete_flag=0), 0), 0) + 0.10 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(c.like_count,0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.like_count,0))) FROM osh_course x WHERE x.status=4 AND x.delete_flag=0), 0), 0) )) * CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, c.create_time, NOW()) <= 30 THEN 1.20 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, c.create_time, NOW()) <= 90 THEN 1.00 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, c.create_time, NOW()) <= 180 THEN 0.85 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, c.create_time, NOW()) <= 365 THEN 0.70 ELSE 0.55 END , 4) AS hot_score FROM osh_course c WHERE c.status = 4 AND c.delete_flag = 0 ) s ORDER BY s.hot_score DESC, s.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
